name: Le Trou's Mouclade
recipeIngredient: Bouquet garni (celery, bay leaf, thyme, parsley stems)
recipeInstructions:
1. Steep saffron threads in white wine for 30 minutes.
2. Saute shallots in butter until limp.
3. Add bouquet garni and wine to the pan; simmer for 1 minute.
4. Add cleaned mussels to the pan, cover with a tight-fitting lid, and steam until all but six of the mussels open. Shake the pan occasionally. Remove opened mussels after about 3 minutes and set them aside in a colander over a bowl to catch juices. Discard any unopened mussels after 6 minutes.
5. Saute remaining shallots in butter until limp.
6. Add mussel juice, heavy cream, parsley, and garlic to the pan; reduce to desired consistency.
7. Toss the cooked mussels in the sauce until well coated.
8. Serve in soup bowls.
